justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "after-tomorrow at 10h" as Wednesday, May 27th at 10:00, and subsequent time requests were also accurately understood.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative dates and times when the initial requests were unavailable, leading to a successful booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was efficient, with the agent quickly understanding the user's requests and making relevant suggestions without unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking the appointment without any issues or jargon.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search for available slots after initial rejections, leading to a successful recovery.
